Kql: let a = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ]; let b = a | where v > 10; let c = b | summarize s = sum(v) by k; c | project k, s | order by k asc
Sql: WITH a AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (1, 20), (2, 30), (2, 30)) AS t(k, v)), b AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM a WHERE v > 10), c AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s FROM b GROUP BY ALL) SELECT k, s FROM c ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: let base = datatable(i:int, l:long, r:real)[ -5,-5,-5.5, 0,0,0.0, 3,2147483648,0.1, 7,100,3.25 ]; let pos = base | where i >= 0; let scaled = pos | extend r2 = r * 2; scaled | project i, r, r2 | order by i asc
Sql: WITH base AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (-5, -5, -5.5), (0, 0, 0.0), (3, 2147483648, 0.1), (7, 100, 3.25)) AS t(i, l, r)), pos AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM base WHERE i >= 0), scaled AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, r * 2 AS r2 FROM pos) SELECT i, r, r2 FROM scaled ORDER BY i ASC

Kql: datatable(id:long, name:string, score:real)[ 1,"a",1.5, 2,"b",2.5, 3,"c",3.5 ] | extend score = score + 100 | extend score = score * 2 | project name, score | order by score asc
Sql: SELECT name, score FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (score), score * 2 AS score FROM (SELECT *, score + 100 AS score FROM (VALUES (1, 'a', 1.5), (2, 'b', 2.5), (3, 'c', 3.5)) AS t(id, name, score))) ORDER BY score ASC

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | summarize count() by k | project count_, k | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT count_, k FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (1, 20), (2, 30), (2, 30)) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | summarize count() by k | order by count_ desc, k asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (1, 20), (2, 30), (2, 30)) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY count_ DESC, k ASC

Kql: print x = 1 | extend ["select"] = 5 | extend ["from"] = 10 | project ["from"], ["select"], x
Sql: SELECT "from", "select", x FROM (SELECT *, 10 AS "from" FROM (SELECT *, 5 AS "select" FROM (SELECT 1 AS x)))

Kql: datatable(["select"]:long, ["from"]:long)[ 1,2, 3,4 ] | where ["select"] < ["from"] | project ["from"], ["select"] | order by ["from"] asc
Sql: SELECT "from", "select" FROM (VALUES (1, 2), (3, 4)) AS t("select", "from") WHERE "select" < "from" ORDER BY "from" ASC

Kql: datatable(["order"]:long, ["group"]:long, ["table"]:long)[ 5,6,7, 1,2,3 ] | extend ["value"] = ["order"] + ["group"] | project ["value"], ["table"], ["order"] | order by ["value"] asc
Sql: SELECT value, "table", "order" FROM (SELECT *, "order" + "group" AS value FROM (VALUES (5, 6, 7), (1, 2, 3)) AS t("order", "group", "table")) ORDER BY value ASC

Kql: datatable(["count"]:long, ["table"]:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y" ] | summarize sum(["count"]) by ["table"] | order by ["table"] asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT "table", COALESCE(SUM(count), 0) AS sum_count FROM (VALUES (1, 'x'), (2, 'y')) AS t(count, "table") GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY "table" ASC

Kql: let t1 = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ]; let t2 = t1 | extend doubled = v * 2; let t3 = t2 | where doubled > 20; let t4 = t3 | summarize total = sum(doubled) by k; t4 | order by k asc
Sql: WITH t1 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (2, 20), (3, 30)) AS t(k, v)), t2 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, v * 2 AS doubled FROM t1), t3 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE doubled > 20), t4 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(doubled), 0) AS total FROM t3 GROUP BY ALL) SELECT * FROM t4 ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: datatable(a:long, b:long)[ 1,2, 3,4, 5,6 ] | extend c = a + b | extend d = c * c | extend e = d - a | where e > 10 | project a, e | order by a asc
Sql: SELECT a, e FROM (SELECT *, d - a AS e FROM (SELECT *, c * c AS d FROM (SELECT *, a + b AS c FROM (VALUES (1, 2), (3, 4), (5, 6)) AS t(a, b)))) WHERE e > 10 ORDER BY a ASC

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 ] | where x > 1 | where x < 5 | where x != 3 | order by x asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4), (5)) AS t(x) WHERE x > 1 AND x < 5 AND x IS DISTINCT FROM 3 ORDER BY x ASC

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 ] | where x > 3 | where x < 2 | order by x asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4), (5)) AS t(x) WHERE x > 3 AND x < 2 ORDER BY x ASC

Kql: let m = materialize(datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 2,30 ] | summarize s = sum(v) by k); m | join kind=inner m on k | project k, s, s1 | order by k asc
Sql: WITH m AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (2, 20), (2, 30)) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) SELECT k, s, s1 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.s AS s1 FROM m AS L INNER JOIN m AS R ON L.k = R.k) ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: let src = materialize(datatable(i:int)[ 1, 2, 3, 4 ]); src | summarize c = count() | extend total = c
Sql: WITH src AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4)) AS t(i)) SELECT *, c AS total FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM src)

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 1, 2, 3 ] | summarize Column1 = count() | project Column1
Sql: SELECT Column1 FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS Column1 FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(i))

Kql: datatable(i:int, name:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ] | project Column1 = i, Column2 = name | order by Column1 asc
Sql: SELECT i AS Column1, name AS Column2 FROM (VALUES (1, 'a'), (2, 'b')) AS t(i, name) ORDER BY Column1 ASC

Kql: print 1, 2, 3
Sql: SELECT 1 AS print_0, 2 AS print_1, 3 AS print_2

Kql: print a = 1, 2, b = 3
Sql: SELECT 1 AS a, 2 AS print_0, 3 AS b

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30 ] | summarize sum(v), count() by k | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS sum_v, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (1, 20), (2, 30)) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30 ] | summarize sum(v), avg(v), min(v), max(v) by k | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS sum_v, COALESCE(AVG(v), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS avg_v, MIN(v) AS min_v, MAX(v) AS max_v FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (1, 20), (2, 30)) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, 3 ] | as T | where x > 1 | project x | order by x asc
Sql: WITH T AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(x)) SELECT x FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(x) WHERE x > 1 ORDER BY x ASC

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 5, 3, 1, 4, 2 ] | sort by x asc | extend rn = row_number() | project rn, x
Sql: SELECT rn, x FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x ASC) AS rn FROM (VALUES (5), (3), (1), (4), (2)) AS t(x) ORDER BY x ASC)

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 5, 3, 1, 4, 2 ] | sort by x desc | take 3 | sort by x asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (5), (3), (1), (4), (2)) AS t(x) ORDER BY x DESC LIMIT 3) ORDER BY x ASC

Kql: let nums = datatable(n:long)[ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 ]; let evens = nums | where n % 2 == 0; let odds = nums | where n % 2 == 1; evens | union odds | sort by n asc
Sql: WITH nums AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4), (5), (6)) AS t(n)), evens AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM nums WHERE n % 2 = 0), odds AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM nums WHERE n % 2 = 1) (SELECT * FROM evens) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM odds) ORDER BY n ASC

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ] | join kind=leftouter (datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 3,300 ]) on k | project k, v, w | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT k, v, w FROM (SELECT L.*, R.* RENAME (k AS k1) FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (2, 20), (3, 30)) AS t(k, v)) AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1, 100), (3, 300)) AS t(k, w)) AS R ON L.k = R.k) ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: datatable(g:string, v:long)[ "a",1, "a",2, "b",3 ] | summarize mv = make_list(v) by g | order by g asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(LIST(v), []) AS mv FROM (VALUES ('a', 1), ('a', 2), ('b', 3)) AS t(g, v) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY g ASC

Kql: datatable(g:string, v:long)[ "a",1, "a",2, "b",3 ] | summarize mv = make_set(v) by g | mv-expand mv | order by g asc, mv asc
Sql: SELECT t.* EXCLUDE (mv), u.value AS mv FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(LIST(DISTINCT v), []) AS mv FROM (VALUES ('a', 1), ('a', 2), ('b', 3)) AS t(g, v) GROUP BY ALL) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(t.mv) AS u(value) ORDER BY g ASC, mv ASC

Kql: datatable(x:long, y:long)[ 1,2, 3,4 ] | extend x = y | extend y = x | project x, y | order by x asc
Sql: SELECT x, y FROM (SELECT *, x AS y FROM (SELECT *, y AS x FROM (VALUES (1, 2), (3, 4)) AS t(x, y))) ORDER BY x ASC

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, 3 ] | summarize c = count() by x | summarize cc = count() | project cc
Sql: SELECT cc FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cc FROM (SELECT x, COUNT(*) AS c FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(x) GROUP BY ALL))

Kql: datatable(x:long, g:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"a", 3,"b" ] | summarize s = sum(x) by g | where s > 2 | extend label = strcat("g_", g) | project label, s | order by s asc
Sql: SELECT label, s FROM (SELECT *, CONCAT('g_', g) AS label FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS s FROM (VALUES (1, 'a'), (2, 'a'), (3, 'b')) AS t(x, g) GROUP BY ALL) WHERE s > 2) ORDER BY s ASC

Kql: let f = datatable(id:long, p:long)[ 1,0, 2,1, 3,1, 4,2 ]; f | join kind=inner (f | project pid = id, pname = p) on $left.p == $right.pid | project id, p, pname | order by id asc
Sql: WITH f AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1, 0), (2, 1), (3, 1), (4, 2)) AS t(id, p)) SELECT id, p, pname FROM (SELECT L.*, R.* RENAME (p AS p1) FROM f AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT id AS pid, p AS pname FROM f) AS R ON L.p = R.pid) ORDER BY id ASC

Kql: datatable(t:datetime, span:timespan)[ datetime(2007-01-01),1d, datetime(2020-06-15 13:45:00),2h ] | extend e = t + span | project t, e, span | order by t asc
Sql: SELECT t, e, span FROM (SELECT *, t + span AS e FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2007-01-01 00:00:00', (86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')), (TIMESTAMP '2020-06-15 13:45:00', (7200000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond'))) AS t(t, span)) ORDER BY t ASC

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a", "b", "c" ] | extend idx = row_number() | where idx > 1 | project idx, s
Sql: SELECT idx, s FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS idx FROM (VALUES ('a'), ('b'), ('c')) AS t(s)) WHERE idx > 1

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | distinct k, v | order by k asc, v asc
Sql: SELECT DISTINCT k, v FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (1, 20), (2, 30), (2, 30)) AS t(k, v) ORDER BY k ASC, v ASC

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | summarize by k, v | order by k asc, v asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, v FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (1, 20), (2, 30), (2, 30)) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC, v ASC

Kql: let agg = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 2,40 ] | summarize sum(v) by k; agg | where sum_v > 15 | project k, sum_v | order by k asc
Sql: WITH agg AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS sum_v FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (2, 20), (2, 40)) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) SELECT k, sum_v FROM agg WHERE sum_v > 15 ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 3, 1, 2 ] | top 2 by x desc | project x
Sql: SELECT x FROM (VALUES (3), (1), (2)) AS t(x) ORDER BY x DESC LIMIT 2

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 3, 1, 2 ] | top 2 by x asc | extend rank = row_number() | project rank, x
Sql: SELECT rank, x FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x ASC) AS rank FROM (VALUES (3), (1), (2)) AS t(x) ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 2)

Kql: datatable(a:long, b:long, c:long)[ 1,2,3, 4,5,6 ] | project c, a, b | project-reorder b, c, a | order by a asc
Sql: SELECT b, c, a, * EXCLUDE (b, c, a) FROM (SELECT c, a, b FROM (VALUES (1, 2, 3), (4, 5, 6)) AS t(a, b, c)) ORDER BY a ASC

Kql: datatable(a:long, b:long, c:long)[ 1,2,3, 4,5,6 ] | project-away b | order by a asc
Sql: SELECT * EXCLUDE (b) FROM (VALUES (1, 2, 3), (4, 5, 6)) AS t(a, b, c) ORDER BY a ASC

Kql: datatable(k:string, v:long)[ "x",1, "y",2, "x",3 ] | summarize total = sum(v), n = count() by k | extend avg = total / n | project k, avg, total, n | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT k, avg, total, n FROM (SELECT *, total / n AS avg FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS n FROM (VALUES ('x', 1), ('y', 2), ('x', 3)) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL)) ORDER BY k ASC

Kql: let r = range x from 1 to 5 step 1; r | extend sq = x * x | where sq > 4 | summarize s = sum(sq) | project s
Sql: WITH r AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT generate_series AS x FROM generate_series(CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(5 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT))) SELECT s FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sq), 0) AS s FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, x * x AS sq FROM r) WHERE sq > 4))

Kql: datatable(["count_"]:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20 ] | summarize count() by ["count_"] | order by ["count_"] asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT count_, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM (VALUES (1, 10), (2, 20)) AS t(count_, v) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY count_ ASC
